visual_description: A woman in a maroon top and grey skirt stands with her back to the camera, observing a tattooed, blood‑stained body lying on a gurney. Two men, one in a white shirt and tie and another in a dark suit, stand nearby. A third man in a white coat enters from the right and leans over the body, appearing to examine it with a handheld device.
audio_description: The audio is mostly silent, with only a faint hum and indistinct murmuring in the background. No clear speech is audible.
